site.title: Toolbox | Practical Online Tools

json-formatter.name: JSON Formatter

github-hosts.name: GitHub Hosts
github-hosts.description: Automatically get GitHub latest IP addresses, one-click generate hosts modification commands for Linux/macOS/Windows

base64.title: 🔐 Base64 Encoder/Decoder
base64.subtitle: Base64 encoding and decoding tool, supports text and file conversion

input.label: Input Content
input.placeholder: Enter content to encode or decode...

encode.title: Encoding Info
encode.content: Base64 encoding converts binary data to ASCII strings, commonly used for data transmission and storage

warning.title: Note
warning.content: Input must be a valid Base64 string for decoding, otherwise an error will be shown

colorPicker.title: 🎨 Scientific Color Picker
colorPicker.subtitle: Color picker designed for scientific papers and academic figures, with journal palettes and colorblind-friendly schemes

harmonies.title: Color Harmonies
harmonies.complementaryDesc: Colors opposite on the color wheel, strong contrast for emphasis
harmonies.triadicDesc: Three evenly spaced colors on the wheel, rich yet balanced
harmonies.splitComplementaryDesc: One color plus the two adjacent to its complement, strong but softer contrast
harmonies.tetradicDesc: Two complementary pairs, rich colors for complex charts
harmonies.analogousDesc: Adjacent colors on the wheel, harmonious and unified for gradients
harmonies.monochromaticDesc: Different lightness values of the same hue, elegant and layered

journal.title: 📚 Journal Palettes
journal.content: Built-in color schemes from top journals like Nature, Science, and Cell for professional figures

colorblind.title: ♿ Colorblind Friendly
colorblind.content: Provides colorblind-safe palettes like Okabe-Ito to ensure accessibility for all readers

export.title: 💻 Code Export
export.content: One-click export to Matplotlib, LaTeX, R code for direct use in your research

jsonFormatter.title: 📋 JSON Formatter
jsonFormatter.subtitle: JSON formatting, beautification and compression tool with syntax validation

tips.tip1Desc: Use Ctrl+V shortcut to paste JSON content directly for quick formatting
tips.tip2Desc: Automatically detects JSON syntax errors and pinpoints exact issue locations
tips.tip3Desc: All processing is done locally in your browser, data is never uploaded to servers

timestampConverter.title: ⏰ Timestamp Converter
timestampConverter.subtitle: Convert between Unix timestamp and datetime

what.title: 💡 What is a Timestamp
what.content: Unix timestamp is the number of seconds or milliseconds since January 1, 1970 UTC

auto.title: 🔄 Auto Detection
auto.content: System automatically detects seconds (10 digits) and milliseconds (13 digits) timestamps

shortcut.title: ⚡ Quick Action
shortcut.content: Click "Now" button to quickly fill in the current timestamp

removeBackground.title: 🎨 Background Remover Pro
removeBackground.subtitle: Smart white/solid color background removal with perfect clipboard support

usage.title: 💡 Tips
usage.content: If background removal is incomplete, try increasing the "Color Tolerance" value (suggested 20-50)

formats.title: 🎨 Supported Formats
formats.content: Supports JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP and other common formats, outputs transparent PNG

privacy.title: ✨ Privacy Protection
privacy.content: All processing is done locally in your browser, images are never uploaded to servers

toast.noImage: ⚠️ No image in clipboard, use Ctrl+V
toast.uploadFirst: Please upload or paste an image first
toast.pickColorHint: 🎨 Click original image to pick color, press ESC to cancel

githubhosts.title: 🐙 GitHub Hosts
githubhosts.subtitle: Automatically get GitHub latest IP addresses, one-click generate hosts modification commands
githubhosts.hostsContentSubtitle: (Copy and paste directly to hosts file)

usage.title: Usage
usage.content: Click 'Fetch Latest IPs' button to resolve GitHub domain IP addresses. After resolution, select your platform and copy the command, then execute it in terminal with administrator privileges.

warning.title: Note
warning.content: Modifying hosts file requires administrator/root privileges. Make sure you understand the commands before executing. IP addresses may change, please re-fetch if connection issues occur.

toast.allFailed: Failed to fetch IPs, please retry later

snake.title: 🐍 Snake Game
snake.subtitle: High-performance Snake game built with Rust + WebAssembly

controls.title: How to Play
controls.keyboard: Use arrow keys or WASD to control the snake
controls.goal: Eat red food to score, don't crash into yourself!

gameOver.title: Game Over
gameOver.pressRestart: Press R or click button to restart

imageEditor.title: 🖼️ Image Editor
imageEditor.subtitle: Easy-to-use online image editor with crop, rotate, flip and more

crop.hint: Hold and drag on image to select crop area

canvas.title: Canvas
canvas.placeholder: Click to upload or drag image here

crop.title: ✂️ Free Crop
crop.content: Supports free crop and fixed ratio crop, drag to adjust crop area

transform.title: 🔄 Quick Transform
transform.content: Supports rotate left/right, flip horizontal/vertical and more

privacy.title: ✨ Privacy Protection
privacy.content: All processing is done locally in your browser, images never uploaded

toast.cropHint: Click crop button, then hold and drag on image to select area
toast.cropTooSmall: Crop area too small, please select again
